narrations.title: What If Alexander the Great Never Died?
narrations.description: Explore real ancient history and thoughtful 'what if' questions. Read, guess, then click to see what happens next.

narrations.title: From Marx to Modern Communism
narrations.description: Marxism, Leninism, Stalin, Mao, and communism today — real history, bold speculation, and guess-prompts at every turn.
